top_issues.title: DPF regeneration problems on 1.4 D-4D diesel variants
top_issues.description: The 1.4 D-4D diesel engine is prone to diesel particulate filter (DPF) regeneration issues, particularly when the car is not driven hard enough or when incorrect oil grades are used. Multiple owners have reported warning lights returning shortly after dealer regeneration, and some have needed forced regeneration at relatively low mileage. Using the wrong oil specification (such as ACEA C2 instead of the required 0W30) can exacerbate the problem.
typical_symptoms: Engine management warning light on dashboard
Reduced fuel economy
Difficulty starting or rough idle
Warning light returning within weeks of dealer service

top_issues.title: Engine failures on early 1.4 D-4D models
top_issues.description: Some early 2011 model year 1.4 D-4D engines have suffered complete failure, producing white smoke and requiring short engine replacement. At least one owner experienced two separate engine failures within 38 months of ownership. This is a rare but catastrophic issue that suggests a potential manufacturing defect in certain early production units.
typical_symptoms: White smoke from exhaust
Loss of power
Engine will not start or runs very roughly
Severe overheating

top_issues.title: CVT gearbox and clutch issues
top_issues.description: The Multidrive S CVT automatic gearbox has been reported to exhibit unexpected downshifting and upshifting at constant speed, though some instances have not recurred. Additionally, clutch thrust bearing failure has been reported on manual transmission models at relatively low mileage, requiring full clutch replacement.
typical_symptoms: Unexpected gear changes at constant speed
Difficulty engaging gears or grinding noise
Clutch pedal feels spongy or has excessive travel
Difficulty starting from a standstill

top_issues.title: Hot starting difficulty on 1.3 CVT models
top_issues.description: Some 1.3 CVT models have exhibited difficulty starting when the engine is warm, particularly after short drives followed by a brief rest period. The engine may require multiple attempts to turn over before firing, which can indicate a fuel system or ignition timing issue.
typical_symptoms: Engine cranks slowly or reluctantly when warm
Multiple attempts needed to start after short journey
Problem occurs after 10+ miles of driving and 30 minutes rest
Eventually starts but with noticeable delay

top_issues.title: Central locking and keyless entry malfunctions
top_issues.description: Some models have experienced intermittent central locking failures where doors unlock or lock randomly and inconsistently, accompanied by audible clicking sounds from the locking mechanism. Keyless entry systems have also been reported to malfunction. These issues can be difficult for dealers to diagnose and replicate.
typical_symptoms: Doors lock or unlock randomly without input
Clicking sounds from door locks
Keyless entry system unresponsive
Some doors lock whilst others unlock simultaneously

overall_reliability_note: The Yaris has a strong reputation for reliability overall, but 1.4 D-4D diesel variants require careful maintenance and proper oil specification to avoid DPF problems, and early 2011 models should be checked carefully for any history of engine issues.
